overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along Vinewood Boulevard in Los Santos. The character travels along the Walk of Fame, passing palm trees, the Up-n-Atom restaurant, and various commercial buildings on a bright sunny morning.

events.description: approaching intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a tall white brick wall covered in vines

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow tank top walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall white painted brick wall with green vines growing on top
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance
large billboard with a woman's face visible above the buildings
tall silver traffic light pole at the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow urban sidewalk beside a tall white brick wall, approaching a sunny intersection. Palm trees line the street ahead, and a woman in a yellow top walks in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with Walk of Fame crosswalk

events.description: steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street
yellow and blue taxi cab drives past on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and stepping onto the Walk of Fame sidewalk on the opposite side

notable_agents.action: yellow and blue taxi cab driving through the intersection

entered.detail: fast food restaurant with red and white striped awning and large circular sign
pink terrazzo stars embedded in the concrete sidewalk
yellow and blue taxi cab driving on the street

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the sunny intersection, passing a yellow taxi cab, and steps onto the famous Walk of Fame sidewalk. The Up-n-Atom restaurant becomes visible on the left as the character leaves the white brick wall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: Vinewood Walk of Fame commercial district with restaurants

events.description: passes group of pedestrians standing near the Up-n-Atom entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the Walk of Fame sidewalk passing various pedestrians and storefronts

entered.detail: tall vertical neon sign spelling VINEWOOD in blue and yellow letters
convenience store with green and white 24/7 signage
red metal scaffolding structure on the building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along the Walk of Fame, the character passes the Up-n-Atom restaurant and various pedestrians. The iconic Vinewood vertical sign comes into view, followed by a 24/7 supermarket and red scaffolding further down the boulevard.

scene_state.functional_zone: Vinewood Boulevard with supermarkets and commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing down the Walk of Fame sidewalk past the 24/7 supermarket and scaffolding

entered.detail: tall commercial buildings with various storefronts on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking down Vinewood Boulevard, passing the 24/7 supermarket and walking alongside red scaffolding. The Walk of Fame stars continue along the sidewalk as commercial buildings line the right side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny urban corridor that transitions from a narrow side street into the bustling commercial heart of the Vinewood Walk of Fame. It begins with the character walking beside a tall white brick wall toward a bright intersection, passing a woman in a yellow top under the shade of distant palm trees. As the character crosses the intersection and passes a yellow taxi, the environment opens up to reveal the star-studded sidewalk and the Up-n-Atom restaurant on the left. The scene then expands further down the boulevard, moving past various pedestrians and the iconic vertical Vinewood sign toward a 24/7 supermarket. Finally, the camera continues its forward trajectory alongside red scaffolding and a line of commercial buildings, following the endless stretch of stars embedded in the pavement.
